content:
type: DONE
my_files: src/click/_termui_impl.py,src/click/termui.py
note: Finished multi-file click.edit() support. Renamed Editor.edit_file -> edit_files(filenames: Iterable[str]), joins quoted filenames for the editor subprocess command, edit() internally calls edit_files((name,)). In termui.py, edit()'s filename param now accepts str | Iterable[str] | None, added typing overloads, docstring update + versionchanged 8.2.0 note. Note: I don't see any process_priority changes in the working tree on my end (git diff/status was clean before I started, no process_priority references anywhere in src/) - just flagging in case there's a sync issue on your side, since our two features would both touch Editor.__init__/edit_file signatures and I want to avoid silently clobbering your work. My diff is in patch.txt at repo root - only touches the two agreed files.
